description_long: This object is a detailed representation of a red crab, featuring a broad, heart-shaped carapace with a rough, mottled texture and dark patches. Its two large, asymmetrical claws are robust and textured, with visible serrations on the inner edges, and are positioned prominently at the front. The crab has six segmented walking legs, each jointed and tapering to a point, with a reddish-brown coloration that transitions to lighter hues at the tips. The eyes are mounted on short stalks protruding from the front of the carapace, giving the crab a vigilant appearance. The underside and rear segments are articulated, with overlapping plates forming the abdomen, and the overall surface appears hard and slightly matte. The coloration is predominantly red with darker and lighter variations, suggesting a natural, weathered exoskeleton.
description: A red crab with a broad, textured carapace, large serrated claws, six jointed legs, and stalked eyes, featuring a hard, matte exoskeleton.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the wide carapace, both large claws, stalked eyes, and all six legs clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the carapace, the full profile of the left claw, and the segmentation of the legs and abdomen.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heart-shaped carapace, overlapping abdominal plates, and the symmetrical arrangement of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the right claw, the curvature of the carapace, and the articulation of the legs and abdomen.
